title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES WINS SEAL AWARD FOR INNOVATION IN SUSTAINABILITY AND FOCUS ON SUSTAINABLE AVIATION FUEL
text: Award recognizes carrier for leadership in sustainability and investment in sustainable aviation fuel project DALLAS , May 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) has been named a 2023 Sustainability, Environmental Achievement, and Leadership (SEAL) Business Awards winner in the Environmental Initiative category for its investment in SAFFiRE Renewables, LLC (SAFFiRE1), a pilot project supporting the development and production of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The SEAL Awards recognize and honor individual programs and initiatives that move the needle on environmental progress and demonstrate leadership toward a sustainable future.

title: Airline stocks could soar this summer if Memorial Day weekend projections are a sign of things to come
text: More than 42 million Americans are expected to travel this Memorial Day weekend according to AAA, which would be 7% more than 2022 and the third-highest ever.  Amid all the flying, there are investment opportunities to be spotted from 30,000 feet.

title: Airlines are bracing for a busy summer travel season — here's what to expect
text: U.S. airlines are bracing for a travel surge this summer, hoping for a smoother season after last summer was marred by delays and cancellations, pilot and crew shortages, and rising fuel prices.

title: Southwest Airlines to Present at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference
text: DALLAS , May 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) has been invited to speak at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference. Bernstein will be webcasting the audio presentation live, and a link to the webcast will be made available via the Investor Relations homepage on the Southwest Airlines website.

title: EY Announces Sean Minter, CEO and Founder of AmplifAI, as an Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2023 Southwest Award Finalist
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #CX--Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) today announced that CEO and Founder, Sean Minter of AmplifAI was named an Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2023 Southwest Award finalist. This is the second consecutive year that Minter has been selected as a finalist for this prestigious award, which recognizes transformative entrepreneurs and leaders of high-growth companies who are building a more equitable, sustainable, and prosperous world for all. Minter was selected by an independent.

title: Southwest Airlines And The Pilot Strike
text: A Southwest Airlines Pilots Association, or SWAPA, strike authorization vote was passed on 11 May. The SWAPA Union is misusing arguments for their vote, and this all appears just self-serving interest for higher pay.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES EXPANDS SERVICE TO NATION'S CAPITAL WITH NEW NONSTOP ROUTES
text: Carrier to offer summer travelers more options with new nonstop service between Washington, D.C., and both Memphis, Tenn.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES DECLARES 177th QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
text: DALLAS , May 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $.18 per share to Shareholders of record at the close of business on June 21, 2023, on all shares then issued and outstanding. The quarterly dividend will be paid on July 12, 2023.

title: Anovion Technologies Announces Plans for $800 Million Initial Investment in New Manufacturing Facility in Southwest Georgia
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Anovion Technologies announces plans for $800 million initial investment in new manufacturing facility in Southwest Georgia.

title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Sees Air Travel Demand, Cost Woes Stay
text: Southwest Airlines (LUV) benefits from a recovery in air-travel demand. Expenses related to fuel prices and labor and airport costs weigh on the bottom line.

title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Pilots Vote in Favor of Strike
text: Almost all the Southwest Airlines (LUV) pilots (99%) vote in favor of a strike.

title: Southwest Airlines pilots vote to authorize strike as they push for pay raises in new contract
text: The union said 99% of members who took part voted to authorize a strike.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES DEBUTS FIRST-EVER BRAND FILM, "ALONE IN TOMBSTONE," BASED ON A WATTPAD SHORT STORY ADAPTED FOR THE SCREEN
text: Airline expands support of 'On The Rise' creatives to include writers and filmmakers with the release of a short film, furthering its dedication to celebrating new voices  DALLAS , May 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) premieres the short film "Alone in Tombstone," a first-ever brand film for the airline and the first Wattpad Brand Original. The film, based on a short story, was written by Wattpad author E.A.

title: Troilus rapidly delineates high-grade structures and extends Zone X22 to the southwest
text: Troilus Gold Corp (TSX:TLG, OTCQX:CHXMF) reported promising assay results from Zone X22 at its Troilus project in Quebec where it holds a land position of 435 square kilometers within the Frôtet-Evans Greenstone Belt. In late 2022, the Montreal-based junior mining company discovered X22, a high-grade gold zone that extends from the formerly mined Z87 pit towards the Gap Zone.

title: EY Announces John Shen of American Lending Center as an Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2023 Pacific Southwest Award Finalist
text: IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ernst & Young announced that John Shen, CEO of American Lending Center, was named an Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2023 Pacific Southwest Award finalist.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES SHOWCASES ITS HEART FOR CORPORATE CITIZENSHIP WITH RELEASE OF ANNUAL REPORTS
text: The One Report and Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Report feature key People, Performance, and Planet initiatives DALLAS , May 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) today announces the launch of its annual corporate social responsibility reports, with the release of the Southwest Airlines® One Report and the Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) Report. Southwest Airlines One Report Southwest Airlines Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion Report Southwest® prides itself on approaching its corporate citizenship initiatives holistically.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES METEOROLOGISTS APPROVE NEW COLLECTIVE BARGAINING AGREEMENT
text: DALLAS, May 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) announced today its TWU 550-represented Meteorologists voted to ratify a new, five-year agreement. It is the sixth collective bargaining agreement that Southwest® and its union partners have ratified since October 2022. “Our Meteorologists support our daily operation with professionalism and expertise, and we are pleased they voted […]...

title: API selected as Southwest Airlines' Technology Solution for Crew Accommodations
text: MELVILLE, N.Y. , May 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Accommodations Plus International ("API") is pleased to announce they have been selected by Southwest Airlines to provide the technology solution Aircrew Exchange Server (ACES) to support hotel needs for Crew Members.

title: Forget Mixed Airlines Earnings: Play JETS ETF on Upbeat Outlook
text: The U.S. airline industry delivered a mixed performance in the first quarter of 2023. With recovering demand, capacity is expected to go up ahead.

title: U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index: Truck Freight Volume Continues to Contract Nationwide Despite Major Increases in Southwest U.S.
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First quarter shipments down 6.1% nationwide while spending increased in all regions except the Midwest.
